body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The local-openai bridge-wrapper prompt-tag line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-021](task-0088): Provider Discovery

## Purpose

Implement provider discovery.

## Scope

- Discovery mechanism
- Registration
- Updates

## Implementation

1. Define mechanism
2. Implement registration
3. Add updates

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Mechanism defined
2. Registration works
3. Updates work
